mapper.select: SELECT f.id AS favorite_id, f.create_time AS favorite_time, p.id AS product_id, p.name AS product_name, p.price, p.`condition`, p.status AS product_status, COALESCE(p.image_url, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(p.images, '$[0]'))) AS image_url, p.images, p.create_time AS product_create_time FROM favorite f INNER JOIN product p ON f.product_id = p.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
